personalities.name: Aggressive
personalities.description: Prefers military expansion. Declares wars often. Rarely accepts peace.

personalities.name: Diplomatic
personalities.description: Prefers alliances and peaceful coexistence. Sends gifts often.

personalities.name: Trader
personalities.description: Economy-focused. Opens trade routes aggressively. Avoids war.

personalities.name: Opportunist
personalities.description: Attacks weakened villages. Switches allegiances based on advantage.

personalities.name: Isolationist
personalities.description: Builds strong defenses and rarely interacts. Hard to invade.
